name: memory_write
description: Store a preference, decision, or lesson as a long-term memory.

name: memory_read
description: Search memories by natural-language query, with Hebbian concept expansion.

name: memory_feedback
description: Rate the usefulness of retrieved memories to tune future recall.

name: memory_stats
description: Inspect how many memories are stored and their distribution.

name: memory_delete
description: Permanently delete a single memory by id.

name: memory_delete_domain
description: Wipe every memory in a domain (requires a confirm flag).
